long_description:
Created from incident source: Parent Incident
Parent incident id: INC10513493
Parent incident caller: TIP.SA
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[COM] Kube apiserver below threshold is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/deployment-pods-not-running.html 
TIP Situation: Insufficient number of kube-apiservers running
TIP Short Description: N/A in mzone757-zonelet01 is having insufficient servers 
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone757-zonelet01:pod:N/A

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum by (kube_cluster_name) (kube_pod_status_ready{condition="true",kube_cluster_name =~ "mzone.*",kube_namespace_name="kube-system", kube_pod_name=~"kube-apiserver.*"} == 1) < 5 = 4
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone757-zonelet01'

Time:             12/06/2025 04:54 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F43995525%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM] Kube apiserver below threshold
Description:  Kube apiserver count is below threshold for the last 15mins
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum by (kube_cluster_name) (kube_pod_status_ready{condition="true",kube_cluster_name =~ "mzone.*",kube_namespace_name="kube-system", kube_pod_name=~"kube-apiserver.*"} == 1) < 5
Duration: 15 m
Alert URL:    https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D556191
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Current incident created by Danny Garcia Arroyo
